examples.no: i bokhylla er det mye å velge i
examples.en: there is a lot to choose from on the bookshelf

examples.no: den lille butikken hadde ikke så mye å velge i
examples.en: the small shop didn't have that much to choose from

examples.no: folk liker å ha forskjellige ting å velge i
examples.en: people like to have different things to choose from
